name: New York
summary: The city where policemen were mobbed by hysterical Levantines on the night of March 22-23.
description:
New York appears among Professor Angell's press cuttings from the period of the 1925 disturbances: policemen there were mobbed by hysterical Levantines on the night of March 22-23.

The item stands in the record beside the other scattered cases of the same period gathered from around the world.

sources.quote: American officers in the Philippines find certain tribes bothersome about this time, and New York policemen are mobbed by hysterical Levantines on the night of March 22-23.
